Hey guys, welcome to Theme Plate 4, the What This Says About You confirmation. This is going to be email 2 within the minimum viable funnel. This is kind of self-explanatory. This is the confirmation that comes right after they opt in to your funnel. Whether that's for your video series, whether that's for your webinar, whether that's for your lead magnet, whatever content you're using, whatever launch strategy you're using, there is always going to be a confirmation email. That's what makes this whole coaching the conversion process very much funnel agnostic because these things, these themes, these aspects of the journey recur, usually across just about any type of launch or system. As we discussed, most marketers will totally fail to recognize the power of the confirmation email, but it's the very first thing I will personally look at when working with new clients and optimizing any of their existing sequences because the current version is always some spin on the following. Thanks for signing up. You're in. We're going to have a lot of fun. Awesome. K-bye. That might be a little bit of an exaggeration, but it's not an exaggeration in the sense that there's no additional value given, no confirmation of their decision, no adding of meaning to their action or teasing of what's to come. That's just a whole stack of missed opportunities and I want us all to just give ourselves a little upgrade right now. The general format of this, when it's less dependent on the structure and that container and more just dependent on having these right ingredients and what you want to be selling or coaching here are just these five Cs, confidence and reassurance in their decision. You want to confirm what this says about them, hence the name of the theme plate and just give clarity around the outcomes. They can expect curiosity around the way the outcome will be delivered or experienced because remember there's no product here. It's still that moment of least friction in your funnel, but there could still be some curiosity around it. How are we actually going to do it? Because curiosity drives that excitement, which is the main milestone we're trying to achieve here and then credibility that you can deliver it. Here is a theme plate you can go to. This is a container. It's less dependent on following this step by step. Feel free to break through those boundaries if it feels right to do so as long as you're hitting on those five Cs, but you will congratulate them on the previous action. You'll confirm to them that this is a bigger deal than they may suspect. This is the big one. You will diagnose what the action tells you about them. These are the positive traits that you get to remind them of and urge them to remain consistent with later on when you make your offer. Tell them that we reward it for that action and what pains, fears, frustrations, things will no longer stand for that they'll no longer have to deal with. This is that moment of highest tension, once again, making that reappearance. What pleasures or desires or positive outcomes will they soon experience that they're new? Normal. Then you could drop a little credibility bomb as to why they can trust you to deliver it. Then you could close by creating a sense of ease that just presupposes they'll be doing something later. Like nothing else to do now. Just sit back, relax, and get ready to solve that problem. Let's see how this plays out. Subject. Thanks for confirming. Here's what this says about you. This is that open loop. Most people will want to see what that means. It's very diagnostic. It's saying something about it. It elicits a very primal curiosity. Right away, it puts you in that leadership authority role. For you to be in a place where you can even diagnose something, being diagnostic is authority. It's form of authority. We're leasing off right in the subject line and right early on in our funnel. This is as soon as they've opted into it. Here we go. On behalf of millions of teens across the country, I want to take a quick second to thank you for signing up for your free video series. Affirming their decision to join, making them realize that it's more significant than they may have thought on behalf of millions of teens across the country. First video should be landing in your inbox in just a few minutes. But first, some real talk. As a parent of a teen, I know things can be crazy on you. Sometimes you want the best for your kid. Your heart's in the right place. Or reflecting back some positive traits. Some things they'd be proud to really have reflected back about them. Yeah, thank you for noticing that it's tough. Thank you for noticing my heart's in the right place. Yet despite your sincere heartfelt efforts to lead them down a healthy, productive path, you keep smacking up and get to wall of resistance. Acting at aggressive outbursts and stone cold silence seem to be the reward for your care and concern. This is where you're having them nodding their head. There's a neck brace moment. Acting at aggressive outbursts. Oh yeah, just said that. Okay, moving on. And if you're feeling unappreciated, fearful, angry, impatient, and even downright resigned or hopeless, all I can tell you is that this is normal. So we're validating that experience. You're not alone. We're making it more about kind of the community. Really making it less isolating. And if you stick around, you'll soon know how to expertly navigate your way through it. And here's why I'm hopeful for you. And this is where we're going to get into a reminder of the outcome they came here for. Despite all the challenges in front of you, you still found this page and had the courage to put your name in that email box. This signals three things to me. This is getting super diagnostic here. Now we're really adding meaning to the click. You still absolutely freaking, literally care. You're not ready to give up and you're ready to empower yourself with the right tools and techniques to meet the challenges of the modern day parent. Now this isn't manipulative at all. This is absolutely true. They opted in to get some tools and techniques, you know, and they're ready to empower themselves. So that's something we get to call them, hold them consistent with later to continuing, to continue empowering themselves when the tools and techniques continue to present themselves in the form of your product. I'm proud to have you in the family. That's a little bit of inclusiveness and reassurance. And I can't wait to reward your perseverance with the tools that will totally transform your relationship with the teen in your life. Much more to come. But for now, keep your eyes peeled on video one. So that's really kind of that more relaxed note that presupposes they're going to be engaged later like rest of now because you're going to be working later. So that is, um, that is the what this says about you confirmation. And on that note, I am going to catch a breath and then meet you back for theme plate five, which is similar, but I just wanted to give you a little bit of a different look how we would do it. Let's say if someone was opting in for a webinar. So that's it for now. I will take a breather, catch my breath and catch you back in theme plate number five. See you then.
